cart_p_6: Leading in the field of trading and selling quality luggage. Perfect travel solutions for every destination.
home_h3_8: Premium imported luggage, designed for long and luxurious journeys
home_p_29: Three expressions of classic luxury for different travel occasions
home_p_30: A compact suitcase that combines functionality with refined style for the modern traveler.
home_p_31: A spacious suitcase that provides the perfect solution for extended travel with comfort and style.
home_p_32: Classic design that combines traditional craftsmanship with contemporary practice for the sophisticated traveler.
home_p_33: We specialize in merging time-honored tradition with contemporary design. Every suitcase we import is carefully selected with a commitment to quality materials, precise handwork, and attention to the smallest details. We don't just sell luggage – we offer a partnership for the journey, an accessory that accompanies you on every trip and reflects your taste and quiet confidence.
home_p_34: Our supply sources span European workshops and select manufacturers, ensuring that every stitch, every zipper, and every handle stands the test of time. We believe that quality luggage is an investment – not just for the next trip, but for decades of travel.
home_p_35: Every NEWTON suitcase is the product of meticulous craftsmanship and attention to the smallest details. We believe that a quality product is an investment for generations, which is why we choose durable materials, excellent hardware, and finishes that stand the test of time.
home_p_36: We select only first-class raw materials: hand-processed Italian leather, fabrics durable for years, and noble metals that never lose their shine.
home_p_37: Every zipper, lock, and buckle is carefully selected. We use Swiss and Italian hardware that undergoes rigorous durability testing before assembly.
home_p_38: The suitcase interior is meticulously designed: double stitching, quality lining, organized compartments, and securing straps that ensure your belongings stay in place.
home_p_39: The final finish is done by hand: polishing, buffing, and processing protective layers that give the product a classic appearance that improves with age.
home_p_40: Our customers tell us about their experience with NEWTON luggage – quality that lasts over time, design that speaks for you.
home_p_41: I bought the suitcase three years ago, and every time I arrive at the airport I receive compliments. It looks like the first day, strong and designed with perfect taste.
home_p_42: I was looking for a suitcase that would last for years, not just another cheap product that would break after first use. NEWTON gave me exactly what I was looking for – real quality.
home_p_43: The wheels are smooth and quiet, the handles are comfortable, and the materials feel luxurious. It's not just a suitcase, it's part of the travel experience itself.
home_p_44: I fly a lot for work, and I need to know that my equipment is protected. With NEWTON I can relax – everything arrives intact, every single time.
home_p_45: There's something about the clean and classic design that just works. It's not trendy that will pass in a year, it's timeless. Exactly what I wanted.
home_p_46: From the moment I entered the store until today, the service has been excellent. They really care that you get the right product, and that you'll be satisfied for a long time.
home_p_47: Choosing the perfect suitcase is a personal decision. The NEWTON team will accompany you through the selection process, explain the available items, and help you find the finish and style that exactly suits your needs.
home_p_48: Professional service at the highest level, with attention to every detail.
home_p_49: Every suitcase undergoes rigorous quality checks before delivery.
home_p_50: We're here even after the suitcase is on its way to you – for any question or need.
home_p_51: Leading in the field of trading and selling quality luggage. Perfect travel solutions for every destination.

about_h2_1: A Modern Home for Classic Travel
about_p_19: At NEWTON, we believe that a suitcase is much more than a travel tool – it's an expression of character, style and refined taste. We specialize in importing and marketing classic luxury suitcases, carefully selected from leading fashion houses and brands with rich heritage. Every item in our collection represents a perfect combination of timeless design, uncompromising quality and functional innovation.
about_p_20: Our curation philosophy is simple: we seek suitcases that tell a story, built by hand from select materials, and that radiate quiet elegance. This is luxury in motion – where every journey becomes a refined experience, every detail speaks of attention and care, and every traveler carries with them a piece of heritage. We don't just sell suitcases; we offer entry into a world of sophisticated travel, where style and quality are top priorities.
about_p_21: Establishing our original curation approach – meticulous selection of classic suitcases from leading European manufacturers, with emphasis on material quality and long-term durability.
about_p_22: Developing stringent product selection criteria – thorough quality testing, design and functionality assessment, and establishing direct partnerships with select craftsmen.
about_p_23: Adding additional classic silhouettes – hard suitcases, soft leather bags, and luxury handbags – while maintaining timeless design principles and distinctive elegance.
about_p_24: Establishing a long-term service culture – personal customer guidance, professional consultation, and ongoing support to ensure every suitcase serves its owner on many journeys for years to come.
about_p_25: For decades, NEWTON has represented excellence in the world of suitcases. Our values are not just words – they are the foundation for every product we offer and every experience we create.
about_p_26: We choose only the finest materials – select Italian leather, durable fabrics and first-class metal accessories. Every component undergoes rigorous testing to ensure durability and quality for years to come.
about_p_27: Every stitch, every zipper, every rounded corner – everything is planned and manufactured with utmost precision. We believe that excellence lies in the small details, so we invest maximum attention at every stage of the production process.
about_p_28: Classic design needs no unnecessary embellishments. Our suitcases radiate luxury and refinement through clean lines, perfect proportions and deep colors. We prefer timeless beauty over fleeting trends.
about_p_29: We treat every customer with a personal and respectful level of service. Our team is available for professional consultation, personalized recommendations and ongoing support – always in a gentle and respectful manner.
about_p_30: A dedicated team of experts bringing decades of experience in the finest suitcase industry, maintaining excellence at every stage.
about_p_32: Daniel leads our international trade operations with a keen eye for quality and authenticity. With over 15 years of industry experience, he carefully selects each item with deep understanding of what makes a suitcase an asset that lasts for generations.
about_p_34: Michal is responsible for our meticulous control process, ensuring every suitcase meets the highest standards of durability, design and craftsmanship. Her sharp eye for detail and commitment to perfection makes every inspection an art of precision.
about_p_36: Jonathan leads our service operations with an approach of discretion and personal attention. He believes every customer deserves an experience that reflects the level of excellence of our products, and provides personalized consultation with patience and genuine listening.
about_p_37: We invite you to consult with us and discover our range of finishes, sizes and special treatments. Our team of experts is here to help you find the perfect suitcase that will accompany you on every journey.
about_p_38: Leaders in the field of trading and selling quality suitcases. Perfect travel solutions for every destination.
home_h3_12: Designed to look exceptional today – and for many decades to come.

home_h3_21: "Classic style that never goes out of fashion"

contact_p_18: We are available to serve you Sunday-Thursday between 09:00-18:00. We will strive to get back to you within 24 hours during business days. For urgent inquiries, please contact us by phone.

hashikma 1, bahan, 3882700, ישראל

contact_p_21:
hashikma 1, bahan, 3882700, ישראל

            Operating hours: Sunday–Thursday, 09:00–17:00. For service and repairs, please schedule an appointment in advance.
contact_p_22: When you contact us, you can expect professional and personal service based on a deep understanding of your needs. We are committed to providing quality long-term solutions while maintaining the discretion and elegance that characterize our brand.
contact_p_23: You will receive detailed and accurate consultation tailored to your specific needs, with clear explanations of every step in the process.
contact_p_24: We will offer you personally customized solutions that reflect your lifestyle and travel preferences, with emphasis on quality and durability.
contact_p_25: We will accompany you even after purchase with professional guidance for maintaining your suitcases for years to come.
contact_p_26: Leaders in the field of trading and selling quality suitcases. Perfect travel solutions for every destination.
gallery_p_12: A journalistic collection of scenes and details that define NEWTON's aesthetic — lounges, corridors, classic streets and close-up craftsmanship.
gallery_p_13: Each image reflects a design hint—silhouette, finish, or travel ritual.
gallery_p_14: In a world where noise is currency, we choose the language of restraint. Each suitcase is a statement of perfect proportions, measured embellishments, and finishes designed to last for generations. No superfluous decorations here—only selected materials, precise stitching, and metal details that tell a story of tradition.
gallery_p_15: Our philosophy is simple: true beauty doesn't shout, it whispers. NEWTON suitcases represent the perfect balance between timeless design and uncompromising functionality, inviting you to join a legacy of travelers with taste.
gallery_p_16: Every NEWTON suitcase is built from a perfect combination of selected materials. From the finest raw materials to precise finishing, we choose only the very best to ensure durability, elegance, and an exceptional user experience.
gallery_p_17: Premium German polycarbonate combined with a reinforced aluminum frame. The material is lightweight yet exceptionally resistant to impacts, scratches, and pressure. Over the years, the shell maintains its shine and develops a subtle patina that testifies to many journeys.
gallery_p_18: Hand-polished brass components, Swiss locks, and Italian security elements. Each metal component undergoes multi-stage polishing and is coated with a corrosion-resistant protective layer. The hardware ages gracefully, acquiring a warmer tone and adding unique character to each suitcase.
gallery_p_19: Quality cotton lining with double seams and padded compartments. The fabric is carefully selected for durability, breathability, and refined appearance. Each seam is executed with millimeter precision, and the lining is designed to protect the suitcase contents while maintaining perfect organization for years.
gallery_p_20: We'll be happy to guide you in choosing the perfect size, finish, and suitability. Contact NEWTON for professional and discreet consultation.
gallery_p_21: Discreet support and quick response to every inquiry
gallery_p_22: Leaders in the field of trading and selling quality suitcases. Perfect travel solutions for every destination.

NEWTON is committed to making services accessible to the general public. We work to implement the guidelines of the Israeli Standard 
            (IS 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 guidelines at AA level.

            This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.
